Comment:
Everyone is not leaving Nepal. Many are still staying back. So in current scenario their are basically two kind of Nepalese-
One who does not want to leave their parents no matter what financial situation or life priorities. They are content and happy with mediocre life. They stay back in Nepal.

Second who has greater ambitions and wants a better life. They leave their parents and settle abroad.

Ma kasailai pani sahi galat bhandina. Both are right in their own respective minds.

Author: @rhythmknight4158
Comment: The reason why people are leaving Nepal is because of their high expectations. The people who are complaining there aren't enough jobs are the ones who seek highly skilled jobs where labour is not required. These types of jobs are not much in demand because the country is under developed and needs labour workers. I went to visit Nepal last year and saw many workers in construction sites and fixing roads, etc. So there are plenty of jobs in Nepal, you just chose to not to do them because you think you should be paid more. A country doesn't build itself magically without labour.

But in the end it all comes down to political stability and leaders who are good in geopolitics.

Author: @jiwanlama2780
Comment: Ma +2 sakiye sakda mero dherai sathi haru Australia lai try gare, maile ni gare. Property ko jhamela le process hault vayo. Tespachhi halka jagar lagayera soch banaye ki Nepal mai padhchu baschhu and kei business kholchhu. Ma 20 years ko thiye. Reality ma vanda imagination ma jiudai rahechhu jun kura aafulai nai thaha thiyena. Hillside tira hotel kholchhu ki euta motorcycle showeoom kholchhu, dhukka le paisa kamaihalchhu vanne aasha ra jagar thiyo. Bachelor gardai garda dherai sathi harule bich bich mai Australia gaye. Koi koi chai Japan ni gaye. Antya ma Bachelor ni sakiyo ra aafu sanga 14k ko job bahek kehi thiyena haat ma. Tesle jiwan chalne thiyena. Jiwan ko kura chhodum tyo samaye ko eklo huda ko kharcha ni tarnu garo vayo. Tespachhi aayo corona. Tyaha samma aauda situation yeti garo vaisakeko thiyo ki Nepal basera napugne Australia jana nasakne vayo. So tyo bela ali popularity gain gardai aairaheko desh Croatia ko barema sunna thale. Interesting lagyo. Kei major cvs nachahine ani dherai lagani pani nachahine vayera aafno luck yetai try gare. Ra sabai process pura garera yaha aaye. Aile 2 barsha vayo. Suru ma aauda eklai thiyo company ma. Nyasro lagthyo. Ek barsha jasto vayepachhi company le ajhai Nepali haru lyaune vane pachhi maile aafno aafanta ra chineko sathiharulai kaam offer gare. Aile 4 jana plus 2 jana feri aaudai chhan. Kamai dherai chhaina tara company le sabai subidha diyera 1 lakh jati kamai hunchha. Aafno sathi bhai ra kei aafanta haru ni sangai chhan. So aba yo sabai huda ma Nepal kina farkine? Tei andhakar ra kalpana ma matra dubna? Malai Nepal ko maya chha tara tyo maya le mero jiwan ramro sanga chalchha ra? Hola Nepal ma ni opportunity haru tara ma jasto middle class family ko ghar herne euta matra income source le aafu ani pariwar sukha sanga rakhna sakla ra? Dherai high profile nahola tara Croatia ko salary le mero ghar ko pariwar haru aananda le khusi sanga basna pako chha. Malai future ko chinta chhaina. So ma kina Nepal farkine? Now I understand what do you mean by manchhe haru bidesh gairako chhaina, desh chhodidako chhan. Ma pani tei madhye euta hu. Jay Nepal, mero Nepal jindabaad tara sayed maile Europe lai nai aafno future sumpiye.
